rdf:Description.rdatd:P70016: Date 1 (B.C.E. date) (NR) B.C.E. - Date 2 (B.C.E. date) (NR) B.C.E.

Beginning of date valid (NR) - End of date valid (NR)
Single or starting date for aggregated content (NR) - Ending date for aggregated content (NR)
rdf:Description.rdatd:P70039: Single or starting date for aggregated content (NR)
rdf:Description.rdatd:P70045: Date span of original release of the contents of a collection/aggregation
